transcript.text:
(This video is a satire, it's all just for fun!) [Incoming call from comedian Choi Joon]
Hello
Huh?
You're pretty
You're really pretty, Tzuyang
Oh no You look handsome
Where are you?
On my way home after work How about you?
I was working
Work?
You're really busy, right?
A little?
Did you eat yet?
No, I'm really hungry
Hungry?
Why haven't you eaten yet?

Because I was busy with work
How can you not eat because of work?!
Work has been busy
But you still have to eat on time You will get sick if you don't
You will not grow if you don't
Okay, I will from now
Tzuyang, you know what?
Come to my restaurant Twozzim
Come and eat as much as you'd like
Are you the owner?
I have become Twozzim owner's oppa
Really? Can I go tomorrow then?
Do you want to come tomorrow?
We'll be busy You can come today
What does tomorrow have to do with this?
If you come tomorrow, I will cook you everything you want

Promise me that you will come here with an empty stomach Promise
Stamp?
Copy?
[Let's get this blind date started]
Hello
I'm on my way to a blind date
He said he's a chicken restaurant owner
Do I get to eat chicken every day if I date him?
Hello Tzuyang, It's nice to...
Is that too old-fashioned?
Nice to meet you Tzuyang
Does that not sound natural?
I'm nervous
It's my first time
[Singing]
It should be around here

Where has the time gone?
Let's head out to greet her
I found it
Hello Hello Tzuyang
Why're you so late? I've been waiting for you, dummy
You look more handsome in person
You're prettier
[Endure it]
[Importance of the camera angle]
Chicken... How many can you give me?
As many as you want
We're not open today
It's closed just for you
Really?
And what should we do for the rest of the day?
I will let you know later

Come on in
[This video was filmed in compliance with COVID-19 quarantine rules]
Wait
Lady first
Thank you
Be careful
Sit
Okay good job
I'm seated too
What?
Yes?
So pretty
I can't look to the side anymore
Sorry, I'm shy too
Same here
My head isn't considered big

But since your head is so small
My head seems bigger than usual
Maybe because you're leaning forward
Cute
How can you speak so nicely?
So nice and have a good heart
That's why you're so popular
Wait a sec (Can't take it anymore)
I'm having a malfunction
What malfunction? I will fix it for you
Tell me, where is it?
My head No, it's okay I will fix it for you
Take a big breath
I've been curious
What kind of food do you like?
I like meat

You like all kinds of meat?
Well
Excuse me, cute waitress
Can we get the menu, please?
Hello
What will you eat, Tzuyang?
I want to eat everything...
Should I make a recommendation? Yes
Joon's new menu item just for Tzuyang
Really?
New dish?
First, Fire Demon Fire Chicken
I'm not good with spicy food
Don't you worry, You can choose the spicy level
[Looks around]
Nevermind, sorry You can't

[You cannot choose the level of spiciness for the Fire Demon Fire Chicken]
I will help you out if you can't eat too much of it
Do you have anything that can cool it down? Let's see what else is there
Another new item Truffle Cream Braised Chicken
If you eat them together,
1 is spicy and 1 will neutralize the spiciness
How would you like these 2?
I love it
Then I will prepare that for you
All you have to do is eat
I will be right back
Don't rush us because I'm in the kitchen
I am here for you
Okay? Okay
Be right back
I told you not to be sad Why are you like this?

Don't do that
I'm not sad
I'm heading to the kitchen now
Cute
Give me just a minute
[Oh right]
Tzuyang, I'm sorry but,
I feel bad for cooking you just 2 dishes
I will make Kimchi Braised Chicken and Rosé Braised Chicken
I'd love that
Really?
The best
Oh and by the way, Don't look at my left jawline because you might fall in love
Bye
[Let's get started]
[Twozzim]

[Joon will make it for you]
[Cook up glass noodles as well]
[Truffle Cream Braised Chicken]
[Rosé Braised Chicken]
[Joon's left jawline]
[Kimchi Braised Chicken]
[Fire Demon Fire Chicken] (Very spicy)
[Something to cool off the spiciness]
Tzuyang, it's almost finished Give me a sec
Here's your order
Rosé Braised Chicken, Truffle Cream Braised Chicken
Kimchi Braised Chicken
Don't touch anything!
It's dangerous
Don't even move These are hot
Can you move that just a bit?

I thought you said not to touch...
I will carefully
Move move Stay stay
Do you know what this is? What?
Curious or not curious? Curious
Say it louder Curious or not curious?
Curious!
Side menu
I prepared something that you might like
[Let's start the mukbang]
Let's go 1 by 1
Rosé Braised Chicken
Kimchi Braised Chicken
Fire Demon Fire Chicken
Truffle Cream Braised Chicken
And side items

Cheeseballs, fried seaweed roll, donkatsu, shrimp tempura
And which one is this?
The outside is very pretty
Star dog
The bread crumbs are shaped like stars
There are also stars in your eyes
I don't even think I need to eat
I will get full from watching you eat
Then I will eat everything
I will be sad if you say that
You should say we need to eat together
Bon appetit
Is this the Fire Demon?
Fire Demon Fire Chicken
If you eat just the chicken, it's not too spicy
Let's try it Is it that spicy?

[How is it?]
[Is it okay?]
Why why? Is it spicy?
It was okay at first It's really delicious
Right?
Good kind of spicy
It's really good
But really spicy
If you mix it with other dishes, it will complement very well
This is that tasty truffle
You can smell that, right?
I have to do it for you, but you're the professional in this field
Looks so good
How is it? Amazing
Good, right? Yes it is
How can you slurp it that well?

Really good
Mixed with truffle and cream
The combination is really good
Really tasty
I'm in love
I knew you'd like it
Eat slowly So good
Don't get an indigestion
You need some scolding
I'm next to you
I have hands too
Do I not know that?!?!
I know it but I will do it for you
And let me make this clear
Don't look at my forearm when I open this bottle of coke You might fall in love
[Joon is so sweet]

This is really delicious
There are lots of different types of cream
But this is a first for me
A very strong flavor of truffle
And..
Take your time, don't worry about me
It has a kick to it as well
The cream and the truffle really complement each other
It's a cream flavor I've never had before
So good
Wait,
I've found a fault in you, cutie Tzuyang
What is it?
You don't eat the vegetables Picky eater
Do you not like people that don't eat veggies?
No, I like it

Let's try the Fire Demon
Cheers? Cheers
[1 bite each]
I'm good at eating spicy foods
Are you?
Do you want to try the glass noodles?
Glass noodles?
[No problem]
[It's here]
Let's talk for a bit
Why?
It's so spicy
[Just try it]
[Give me a sec]
You're weak to spicy food
I can eat it but

Try it
Eat it just like this
Give it 30 seconds
[Detecting a strange aura]
[Acting]
Swallow
[It's fine]
[Not his feet]
Why?
I'm expressing the deliciousness with my body
You can drink some coke
[Help me] So good
[Sweating]
Thank you for recommending me the glass noodles, Tzuyang
[Let's continue the mukbang]
[Same location, different temperature]

It's good if you dip it here
[I will try that later]
It's so good
[Picking out the vegetables]
How're you so good at picking out all the vegetables?
Wait a sec
[What is it?]
[Alcohol?]
Alcohol all of a sudden??
Why do you think this is here?
Do you want to drink?
Me?
You will date me if you drink that
I won't say much
I said what I had to
And you heard what I said

You will have to make the decision
[Thinking about it]
Don't drink it if you don't want to
I hate that
Do as your heart pleases
[This is water btw, not soju]
We just met today So?
We should get to know each other more
I want that
What else do you want to know about me?
[Not really]
Sorry
Hello?
Address?
I will get it to you right away
Thank you

Thank you for ordering Twozzim Will be there soon
Love you Thank you
Thank you, customer
Tzuyang, I'm sorry but...
I just got a delivery order
I have to go
Then you should
Are you sad?
Then...
Can I just take this one?
[Taking it because it's too spicy for Tzuyang] I will take this with me
I have to go out for a delivery Sorry
Bye
I'll be waiting for you
Bye Tzuyang, wait for you
Wait

Let me say something
I will let other owners know so that you ladies can enjoy Twozzim
There will be a 5,000 Won discount if you order on Yogiyo delivery app from 9/17 to 9/23
And 3 cheeseballs on the house if you select Joon's Set from the side menu
Show Twozzim some love
Promise
Stamp
Copy
And a kiss
Bye
[We all feel the same, Tzuyang]
Comedian Choi Joon is actually the model for this franchise
He came to help out
[Still funny]
He definitely left an impression
I had the truffle one and the fire one with Choi Joon

I really liked it
Now I'm going to try these 2
This is aged kimchi and this is rosé
They put the whole kimchi in here
Looks good
That aged kimchi smell
I have to cut it vertically
Rip it the long way
Some braised chicken
Wrap it
Looks good
I had rosé braised chicken before, but not the kimchi one
It's a mix of braised kimchi and chicken
It's just like Steamed Kimchi
[Glass noodles with Kimchi]
[Chopstick pointer of truth]

It's perfect when you're craving both Braised Kimchi and Braised Chicken
Rosé this time I had this before
It's really good
Rosé flavor is very popular these days
Check out the glass noodles
Let's cut it once since it's too long
Looks good
Dip it
I think it's better because I'm dining-in
Much better than getting it delivered
The cream sauce is really delicious
The cheesy cream flavor
Take the potato
Break it up It's cooked so well
Dip it
Tasty

It has a nice texture
I like boneless, but sometimes you get dry meat
But all the meat here are so tender
They only used the thigh meat
I love it
I need to eat the glass noodles too
Glass noodles are still good even if they have been sitting here for a while
It's better when it's dried out like this
I forgot about the fried food because of the chicken
Totally forgot
The star dog If you look closely,
The breadcrumbs are shaped like stars
Let's cut this in half
I thought that was a sausage, but it's mozzarella cheese inside a ham
[That cheese pull]
[Choi Joon recommended her to eat it like this]

They will taste so good together
Dip it
[Crispy]
The star-shaped breadcrumbs
I didn't think it's special But it tastes different
It's more like chips
Yummy
It's a whole different kind of breadcrumb
Cut it
It's a cool idea to wrap the chicken with aged kimchi
Roll it up like this
Ta-da
Kimchi tastes great
Sweet potato!
Potato here and sweet potato here
It's sweet

Kimchi
[Donkatsu (pork cutlet) too!]
It's big
That crunchy sound
Dip this in here
Jumbo shrimp tempura
It even has the head
Some people take the head off
But it tastes good with it
Cheeseball too
It must've been hardened by now
Sadly
It's good even if it's cold
It's chewy as soon as you bite into it
I tried 4 different dishes here
But that Fire Chicken one was way too spicy

It wasn't too bad at first
But it crept up after 30~40 seconds
I felt it right here
But it was a good kind of spicy and an addicting one too
Spicy food lovers will really enjoy it
Truffle one is by far the best one from here
I'm almost finished with the food, but where is he?
[I just continue to eat]
[And then a text message]
I'm sorry, Tzuyang
I spilled some food on my clothes when I was delivering the food
So I'm here to change
I might not make it in time to watch you finish the mukbang
Please enjoy Twozzim even if I'm not there
Enjoy the food
Thank you

[Just laugh]
Show some love for Twozzim Promise?
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'World Love Regional Children's Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
